title: Plumstead Township Police Department Honors Fallen Officers at Annual Memorial Ceremony
summary: Members of the Plumstead Township Police Department, accompanied by Post 5708 Police Explorers, participated in the annual Police Memorial Ceremony at St. Andrew Catholic Church in Newtown, PA. The ceremony serves as a reminder to honor and remember the law enforcement officer...

summary: Chief Friel would like to thank the Bucks County Police Memorial Committee, and the Newtown Township Police Department for organizing a meaningful memorial service yesterday evening. Officers from the Warrington Township Police Department were honored to attend the Bucks Count...
